nodes.label: Zurich Logo (Vertical Black CMYK)
nodes.rationale: Vertical black CMYK Zurich logo without the registered trademark symbol (no R), used as a visual branding asset in the custom ProcessMaker 4 screens.

nodes.label: Zurich Branding Assets
nodes.rationale: A collection of visual identity assets (logos, typography, colors) to theme the ProcessMaker 4 interface custom forms for Zurich Regional (Colombia).
